queries.plan:
Estimate    Actual  Operator
       -         1  PROJECT a1, a2
       -         1  AGGREGATE COUNT(a5) AS a1, COUNT(a7) AS a2
       -   1500000  PROJECT o_orderkey, c_custkey
       -   1500000  PROJECT a5, a7
       -   1500000  FULL JOIN HASH ON PROJECTION_627.o_custkey = PROJECTION_623.c_custkey
       -         1  │└PROJECT c_custkey, c_custkey AS a7
       -         1  │ PROJECT c_custkey
       -         1  │ FILTER (c_custkey = 1) AS a9
       -    150000  │ TABLE SCAN customer
       -   1500000  PROJECT o_custkey, o_orderkey AS a5, o_orderkey
       -   1500000  PROJECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
       -   1500000  TABLE SCAN orders
queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(o.o_orderkey), COUNT(c.c_custkey)
FROM tpch_sf1.orders AS o
FULL JOIN (
  SELECT *
  FROM tpch_sf1.customer
  WHERE c_custkey = 1
) AS c
  ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey;

theorem.description: Count rows after FULL JOIN from ORDERS to CUSTOMER with a one-sided CUSTOMER key filter
theorem.name: PLAN_JOIN_CHECK-FULL-ORDERS-CUSTOMER-FILTER-CUSTOMER
